definitions.text: A thing that has physical existence but is not alive.
Objective; goal, end or purpose of something.
To disagree with or oppose something or someone; to raise an objection.
examples: I object to the proposal to build a new airport terminal.
We strongly object to sending her to jail for ten years.

definitions.text: To offer in opposition as a criminal charge or by way of accusation or reproach; to adduce as an objection or adverse reason.
